description_long: This animal has a robust, muscular body covered in dense fur that transitions from a lighter brown on the back and sides to darker brown or black on the legs, face, and tail. Its head is broad with a short snout, small rounded ears, and prominent dark eyes. The limbs are powerful and end in large paws equipped with long, curved claws, well-suited for digging or climbing. The tail is bushy and tapers to a point, matching the darker coloration of the legs. The animal's overall build is low to the ground, giving it a stocky and agile appearance. Its fur appears thick and somewhat coarse, providing insulation in colder environments.
description: A stocky, muscular animal with dense brown fur, dark legs, and a bushy tail, featuring a broad head and large claws.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad head, short snout, and large, dark paws with visible claws.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the animal's elongated body, bushy tail, and the gradient from lighter to darker fur.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the bushy tail, muscular hindquarters, and the symmetry of the fur coloration.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the animal's powerful limbs and overall body proportions.
